name: swiss-international
description: 瑞士国际主义风格 - 斜向排版、几何色块、高饱和对比色、Helvetica 字体
prompt_template: Swiss international style poster, brutalist graphic design, bold geometric shapes, diagonal typography layout, high saturation primary colors, {palette}, light gray background {background}, clean sans-serif typography, asymmetric composition, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: gradients, shadows, decorative, ornate, serif fonts, vintage textures, rustic
